overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from a vessel's bridge at night. The camera faces forward through the bridge windows toward the ship's bow, with three navigation monitors visible overhead displaying charts, radar, and systems data.

agents.ego_description: navigating the vessel from the bridge while monitoring the radar and electronic chart displays

entered.detail: Electronic chart plotter showing nautical map with yellow landmasses and blue water
Circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding targets
Blue-tinted systems monitor displaying vessel data and readouts
The forward deck and railing of the ship visible through the bridge windows
Metal structural frame of the bridge windows with diagonal support pillars

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place inside a ship's bridge at night, with the camera positioned behind the navigation consoles looking forward. Three electronic displays are mounted overhead: a chart plotter showing coastal geography on the left, a rotating radar in the center, and a systems monitor on the right. Through the forward windows, the vessel's bow deck is visible against the dark water as the ship maintains steady forward motion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from within a ship's bridge, focusing on the vessel's forward progress through a dark nocturnal sea. It begins positioned behind the navigation consoles, where three electronic displays—a chart plotter, a rotating radar, and a systems monitor—glow overhead. As the camera looks forward, the view extends through the bridge windows to reveal the ship's bow deck. The scene remains fixed on this forward trajectory, emphasizing the contrast between the illuminated interior instruments and the deep darkness of the open water ahead.
